description: User navigates from the lender features selection page to the credit history question.
frame_description: The screen transitions from a list of lender features to a question about credit history.

description: User pauses on the credit history selection page, likely reading the available options.
frame_description: The user remains on the credit history question page for several seconds.

description: User selects 'Excellent - No Issues' and navigates to the first name input page.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Excellent' option before the page transitions to a name input field.

description: User navigates from the first name page to the income source question.
frame_description: The page transitions from a name input field to a question about income source.

description: User navigates from the income source page to the property value input page.
frame_description: The page transitions from income source options to a property value input field.

description: User navigates from the property value page to the loan balance input page.
frame_description: The page transitions from property value input to a current loan balance input field.

description: User navigates from the loan balance page to the home loan rates comparison landing page.
frame_description: The page transitions from the final input step to a summary landing page showing home loan rates.

description: User navigates away from the Lendi site back to Google search results.
frame_description: The browser transitions from the Lendi landing page back to the original Google search results page.
